module.name: src
module.purpose: Second-generation Rust source organized into client, agent, and common modules with remoc session transport, TaskEvent tool invocation/status query/status return traffic, session-owned client Executor placeholders, client-only ToolRuntime state, shared ToolSignature/ToolExecutionStatus protocols, and a lean agent loop where ModelRequest carries ModelTaskStepKind and ModelResponse streams content/failure results.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent modules for remoc-backed frontdoor Session/Task endpoints, a session-scoped LoopEngine with configured model backend state, public Plan/Job/TaskStep shapes, ModelRequest step purpose, and ModelResponse content/failure results.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client modules for CLI, remoc-backed core Session/Task, a session-owned Executor managing ToolRegistry and client-only ToolRuntime instances, shared common::protocol ToolSignature/ToolExecutionStatus tool types, and Config-aware tool registry/runtime tooling.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared configuration, logging, message envelopes, remoc SessionEvent lifecycle/create/cancel events, TaskEvent tool invocation/status query/status return signals, common ToolSchema/ToolParameter/ToolInvocation/ToolSignature/ToolExecutionStatus/ToolType/ToolPreview/ToolError protocol types, and crate-local external-library namespaces.
